positive: A highly stylized, abstract composition featuring geometric mountain ranges and celestial elements. The mountains should have clean, sharp silhouettes rendered in deep sapphire blue and charcoal grey. Above the mountains, incorporate swirling nebulae and crescent moons in ethereal turquoise, gold leaf accents, and deep indigo. The composition should be centrally focused, maintaining strong contrast against a slightly textured, parchment-like background that grounds the piece for apparel printing. Use minimal, elegant line work combined with solid color blocking. Style: Neo-minimalist abstract art, inspired by Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints and Art Deco geometry. Lighting: Flat, studio light emphasizing crisp edges and defined shapes. Composition: Vertical balance, perfect symmetry, ideal for screen printing.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, noisy, artifact, ugly, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, fuzzy, graffiti, photorealistic, messy, muted colors
